title: OCC proposal seeks to settle stablecoin yield debate, clearing way for CLARITY
message_html: OCC proposal seeks to settle stablecoin yield debate, clearing way for CLARITY ...
snippet: The OCC’s proposal to implement the GENIUS Act would bar yield on payment stablecoins and introduce a rebuttable presumption against common issuer–affiliate reward structures.

title: Telegram crypto wallet unveils yield for Bitcoin, Ethereum and USDT holdings
message_html: Telegram crypto wallet unveils yield for Bitcoin, Ethereum and USDT holdings ...
snippet: TON Wallet is shifting from simple self-custody into a gateway for third-party DeFi yield strategies.
